title: grevillea sarissa subsp. anfractifolia
intro: Grevillea sarissa subsp. anfractifolia, also known as the twisted grevillea, is a unique and lesser-known species within the Grevillea genus. Native to Australia, this shrub is recognized for its unique, twisted leaves and vibrant yellow flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. Herbal preparations of Grevillea sarissa subsp. anfractifolia can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its health benefits, which include soothing respiratory issues, reducing fever, and promoting overall well-being.
